title: Strydom murder: accused remains in custody, charges added
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Two counts of defeating the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Two counts of defeating the ends of justice have been added to the murder case of 40-year-old Mervyn Bock, who stands accused of murdering his girlfriend, Velia Angelique Strydom (39).","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Two counts of defeating the ends of justice have been added to the murder case of 40-year-old Mervyn Bock, who stands accused of murdering his girlfriend, Velia Angelique Strydom (39)."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Strydom’s body was discovered on 12 December near the Red Bridge outside Knysna, prompting a police investigation that led to Bock’s arrest."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"During Bock’s first court appearance on Monday 5 January, the state indicated that the incidents which allegedly resulted in Strydom’s death may have occurred between 6 and 8 December. The prosecution opposed Bock’s release on bail, citing the seriousness of the charges against him.","html":"During Bock’s first court appearance on Monday 5 January, the state indicated that the incidents which allegedly resulted in Strydom’s death may have occurred between 6 and 8 December. The prosecution opposed Bock’s release on bail, citing the seriousness of the charges against him."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The court remanded Bock in custody and the matter was postponed to 26 January for a formal bail hearing.","html":"The court remanded Bock in custody and the matter was postponed to 26 January for a formal bail hearing."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read previous articles:","html":"Read previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["Drive-by memorial held for Velia Strydom following death near Red Bridge","Boyfriend in court for Knysna murder","More charges possible in Strydom murder"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
